description: Curated local real-image regression suite. Source images stay outside git; this file records paths, bounded configs, and semantic expectations.

notes: Real generated illustration with transparent background, anti-aliased palette drift, strong primitive anchors, cut-out-looking white strokes, and a perspective table grid.
This case should remain bounded: always run with max_size, max_colors, max_component_area, and timeout_seconds until M1/M2 performance work is stronger.

promotion.source_provenance: local generated image from the user's Desktop; source image is not checked in

hard_gates.description: The gold dots and brooches must remain circle anchors rather than drifting into generic paths or ellipses.
The table must preserve enough editable quad cells and a perspective-grid relationship.
Clean line-like details should remain editable strokes.

region_gates.description: The known gold dot/brooch region must contain five editable circle anchors, not just circles elsewhere in the image.

review_notes: Perspective grid group exists, but only 2 of expected 8 quad anchors are recovered.

expectations.description: Three center dots plus two shoulder brooches should stay true circles.
Table tiles should be editable perspective quads, not noisy polygons.
Detected table quads should be grouped as a perspective grid.
Known table, stroke, and circle anchors should remain mostly primitive, while broad figure regions may fall back after oversized arc rejection.
Same-color fragmentation may exist but should stay within a bounded regression envelope.
Clean line-like regions should remain editable strokes.

notes: Original generated illustration before the transparent-background real-image tweak. This keeps the suite honest against anti-aliased RGB drift on an opaque white background.
Use bounded preprocessing so this case remains a fast semantic-regression check for circles, strokes, and the perspective table grid.

promotion.source_provenance: local generated image from the user's Downloads folder; source image is not checked in

hard_gates.description: The gold dots and brooches must remain circle anchors.
The table must preserve editable quads and perspective-grid grouping.
Clean line-like details should remain editable strokes.

review_notes: 2026-06-13 curated-check reported missing_source for the configured local path.
Keep this case visible until the source path is restored or a check-in-safe fixture is created.

expectations.description: Three center dots plus two shoulder brooches should stay true circles.
Table tiles should be editable perspective quads, not noisy polygons.
Detected table quads should be grouped as a perspective grid.
Known table, stroke, and circle anchors should remain mostly primitive, while broad figure regions may fall back after oversized arc rejection.
Same-color fragmentation may exist but should stay within a bounded regression envelope.
Clean line-like regions should remain editable strokes.

notes: Real UI screenshot with black text, anti-aliased glyphs, and a small unselected radio button.
This case is a different family from the Greek-figures/table images: it stresses text fragmentation, tiny UI strokes, and simple circular controls in a mostly white interface.

promotion.source_provenance: local UI screenshot from the user's Desktop; source image is not checked in

hard_gates.description: The unselected radio control must remain an editable stroked circle.
Text-like fragments should remain bounded stroke-like primitives until text handling exists.

region_gates.description: The visible unselected radio-control region must contain a stroked circle anchor inside the expected source bounds.

review_notes: Still yellow under v10+ rules because promotion state is not implemented.

expectations.description: The unselected radio control should produce at least one true editable circle-stroke anchor at this analysis scale.
Anti-aliased text and UI strokes should remain bounded as editable stroke-like primitives rather than hanging the pipeline.
The UI screenshot should keep simple controls and selected stroke fragments primitive, while text glyphs may fall back until text-specific handling exists.
